# Repository metadata checklist (GitHub)

This file tracks manual repository metadata settings that must be configured in GitHub during OSS launch.

## Core profile

- [ ] Repository description set
- [ ] Homepage URL set
- [ ] Topics added (`dotnet`, `cli`, `translation`, `localization`, `ai`)

## Community profile

- [x] LICENSE present
- [x] CONTRIBUTING guide present
- [x] Code of Conduct present
- [x] Security policy present
- [x] Support policy present
- [x] Issue templates present
- [x] Pull request template present

## Package and release links

- [ ] NuGet package link added (`veeling`)
- [ ] Releases page and install docs linked from README

## Ownership and maintenance

- [ ] Maintainer contact details verified in repository profile
- [ ] CODEOWNERS added (optional but recommended)
